description: This file defines utility functions and schemas related to examples in an Astro project, including schema validation, asset retrieval, page filtering, and path parsing.

methods.name: getExamplesAssets
methods.description: Retrieves all example asset paths recursively from the 'src/assets/examples' directory.

methods.name: getAliasedExamplesPages
methods.description: Filters a list of AstroInstance pages to only include those with aliases.

methods.name: getExampleNameFromPagePath
methods.description: Extracts the example name from a given page path using regex matching.
